question: Show all customer names with the  payment method code used by least number of customers.
sql: SELECT customer_name FROM Customers WHERE payment_method_code IN (SELECT payment_method_code FROM Customers GROUP BY payment_method_code HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MIN(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM Customers GROUP BY payment_method_code) AS sub))

back_translation.intent: 查询具有最少支付方式的客户名称
filters: payment_method_code IN (SELECT payment_method_code FROM Customers GROUP BY payment_method_code HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MIN(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM Customers GROUP BY payment_method_code) AS sub))

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求显示使用支付方式最少的客户名称，SQL反向翻译通过子查询找到最小计数值的payment_method_code，并筛选出对应客户名称，逻辑完全一致。
